notes: v0.16.47 — PLAY HUB mosaic now has a unique animated mini-scene per kind, all using live SkinAtlas ships (chromatic glow, atlas-rendered cockpits). PRACTICE: SHARD orbits left, cycles 3 moving targets, shoots accent bullets, targets flash on hit. BOSS RUSH: gold/orange/pink ring stack + pulsing core + orbiting ship. MULTIPLAYER: SHARD vs LANCE duel — bullets, HP bars, hit-flash, explosions, auto-reset. CAMPAIGN: SHARD/BASTION/CHORUS V-formation flies right across chapter beads (passed beads light up) — fixes ships flying tail-first. RANKED: 3-tier podium with class ships bobbing. STREAMER: CRT TV holds the player ship + 2 enemy bots (BASTION + LANCE) shooting at it; side `# stream-chat` scrolls fake player nicks + viewer count + LIVE pulse. FUN ROOM: 4 class ships spinning + confetti. Locked tiles still play their full animated scene (desaturated) under the LOCKED stamp. Windows only.
